title: A star-shaped UFO moving in circles over Curitiba [2002]

text_preview:
AUG 8th, 2002. 10:48 pm. Duration: 25 seconds. In the Batel neighborhood of Curitiba, State of Paraná, a university professor, using binoculars, spotted an unidentified red star-shaped flying object, moving in circles, flying at an altitude of approximately 5,000ft and heading West from the East. The sighting of the unidentified flying object was carried out under conditions of visibility described as “good”.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.625. “Questionári
summary: A university professor in Curitiba's Batel district saw a red star-shaped UFO moving in circles at 5,000ft altitude heading west for 25 seconds on 8 Aug 2002.
